seed_instruction: Plan a budget-friendly weekend trip to Paris. Highlight key attractions, dining options, and public transportation routes.
org_constraint: Structure the response in JSON format with the following keys: "Attractions," "Dining," "Transportation," and "BudgetTips."
new_constraint: The response must be written in Markdown format, including at least two level-2 headers.

## Budget-Friendly Paris Weekend Itinerary

```json
{
  "Attractions": [
    {
      "Name": "Eiffel Tower",
      "Cost": "Free viewpoint from Trocadéro or Champ de Mars",
      "Note": "Avoid climbing the tower if budget-conscious; the view is excellent from across the river."
    },
    {
      "Name": "Sacré-Cœur Basilica",
      "Cost": "$7 for dome access, free for church visit",
      "Note": "Located in Montmartre, offers panoramic city views."
    },
    {
      "Name": "Jardin des Tuileries",
      "Cost": "Free",
      "Note": "Classic green space in the center of the city, perfect for picnics."
    },
    {
      "Name": "Place Saint-Sulpice Church",
      "Cost": "Free",
      "Note": "Beautiful architecture and gardens open to the public."
    }
  ],
  "Dining": [
    {
      "Option": "Bakery Sandwiches",
      "Location": "Any local 'Boulangerie'",
      "Estimate": "€6 - €10 per meal"
    },
    {
      "Option": "Crêperies",
      "Location": "Le Marais district",
      "Estimate": "€8 - €15 per crêpe"
    },
    {
      "Option": "Market Snacks",
      "Location": "Marché Bastille (Weekends)",
      "Estimate": "€5 - €8 for prepared meals"
    },
    {
      "Option": "Wine & Biscuits",
      "Location": "Supermarkets (Carrefour/Lidl)",
      "Estimate": "€5 - €10 for grocery-style dinner"
    }
  ],
  "Transportation": [
    {
      "Method": "Metro System",
      "Route": "Take Metro Line 8 towards Mairie de Montrouge, then switch to Line 4.",
      "Tip": "Buy a carnet of 10 tickets for better value than single passes."
    },
    {
      "Method": "Walking",
      "Route": "Explore Le Marais and Latin Quarter on foot.",
      "Tip": "Most historical sites in central districts are walkable."
    },
    {
      "Method": "Tramway T2",
      "Route": "Ride from Centre Pompidou to République.",
      "Tip": "Good for reaching northern outskirts cheaply."
    }
  ],
  "BudgetTips": [
    "Stay in neighborhoods like Belleville or Ménilmontant for lower rent prices near attractions.",
    "Bring water bottles to refill stations rather than buying plastic-wrapped drinks.",
    "Check museum 'Jeudi' (Thursday) late-night hours for discounted or free entry.",
    "Use CityPass or free walking tours if you want guided history for free."
  ]
}
```
